steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The verb must agree with the subject of the clause. In the phrase the toxins the organism uses, the modifying words do not change the subject: toxins is plural.

steps.title: Match the plural subject
steps.content: A, C, and D all use singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject. The plural present-tense verb form agrees with toxins. The answer is B.
